mapper.select:
SELECT id, se_expander_equip_code, se_expander_name, se_expander_type, se_expander_spec, se_expander_rated_power, se_expander_rated_speed, se_expander_inlet_p, se_expander_inlet_t, se_expander_outlet_p, se_expander_outlet_t, se_expander_media, se_expander_material, se_expander_explosion_proof, se_expander_coupling_type, se_expander_bearing_type, se_expander_lubrication, se_expander_install_pos, se_expander_in_service, se_expander_inspect_cycle, se_expander_last_inspect, se_expander_next_inspect, se_expander_inspect_result, se_expander_last_lubricate, se_expander_next_lubricate, se_expander_vibration, se_expander_efficiency, se_expander_maintain_record, se_expander_fault_record, se_expander_operator, se_expander_create_time, se_expander_update_time, se_expander_status, se_expander_factory, se_expander_reserve1, se_expander_reserve2, se_expander_reserve3 FROM se_expander
and se_expander_equip_code like CONCAT( #{queryParams.seExpanderEquipCode}, '%')
and se_expander_name = #{queryParams.seExpanderName}
and se_expander_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seExpanderStatus}, '%')
and se_expander_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seExpanderFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, se_expander_equip_code, se_expander_name, se_expander_type, se_expander_spec, se_expander_rated_power, se_expander_rated_speed, se_expander_inlet_p, se_expander_inlet_t, se_expander_outlet_p, se_expander_outlet_t, se_expander_media, se_expander_material, se_expander_explosion_proof, se_expander_coupling_type, se_expander_bearing_type, se_expander_lubrication, se_expander_install_pos, se_expander_in_service, se_expander_inspect_cycle, se_expander_last_inspect, se_expander_next_inspect, se_expander_inspect_result, se_expander_last_lubricate, se_expander_next_lubricate, se_expander_vibration, se_expander_efficiency, se_expander_maintain_record, se_expander_fault_record, se_expander_operator, se_expander_create_time, se_expander_update_time, se_expander_status, se_expander_factory, se_expander_reserve1, se_expander_reserve2, se_expander_reserve3 FROM se_expander
and se_expander_equip_code like CONCAT( #{seExpanderEquipCode}, '%')
and se_expander_name = #{seExpanderName}
and se_expander_status like CONCAT ('%',#{seExpanderStatus}, '%')
and se_expander_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{seExpanderFactory}, '%')
